description_long: This rifle features a classic AK-style silhouette with a wooden stock and handguard, complemented by a black metal barrel and receiver. The central body and handguard are adorned with a vibrant, multicolored camouflage pattern, incorporating shades of red, green, and tan, which contrasts with the natural wood finish of the stock and foregrip. The magazine is a curved, detachable box type in matte black, typical of AK-pattern rifles. The front and rear iron sights are visible, with the front sight post highlighted in red for enhanced visibility. The muzzle is fitted with a standard flash hider, and the trigger, safety lever, and charging handle are all present and visually distinct. The overall design blends utilitarian function with decorative urban flair, making it visually striking and easily recognizable.
description: A visually striking AK-style rifle with a wooden stock, multicolored camouflage body, black metal barrel, and red-highlighted iron sights.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the red front sight post, flash hider, and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, camouflage-patterned body, black magazine, and red sight details.
description_view_2: The rear view focuses on the wooden stock and the back of the receiver, with the camouflage pattern visible along the top and the black buttplate.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the wooden stock, camouflage body, black magazine, and red sight, with the safety lever and charging handle more visible.
